title: glaucium cappadocicum
intro: Glaucium cappadocicum, also known as the Turkish poppy or horn poppy, is a flowering plant species in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antispasmodic and expectorant properties. Glaucium cappadocicum is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of tinctures, infusions, or topical creams, and is sometimes used to treat conditions like arthritis and respiratory issues.
